svg.title: Proposed Sales School portal architecture
svg.desc: The proposed Sales School portal architecture starts with Course home at /sales-school. It contains Today, Day One, Day Two, Resources, and Facilitator. Day One contains Breakouts 1 through 3, Day Two contains Breakouts 4 through 6, Wistia remains the media layer, and search, progress, admin editing, cohorts, and login are optional later scope.

a.xlink:title: relation-breakout-1-uses-wistia: page-breakout-1 uses media from system-wistia
relation-breakout-2-uses-wistia: page-breakout-2 uses media from system-wistia
